title: Happy Valentines Day Card with Embossed Heart Sticker - Red Foil Design - 150x150mm - Valentines Card Wife, Valentines Card for Him, Her, Husband, or Fiancé – Premium 350 GSM - Made in the UK
features: 💖 GLITTER RED FOIL DESIGN: This Happy Valentines Day card features a stunning red foil and glitter finish, adding a luxurious and eye-catching touch. Its elegant design beautifully captures the spirit of love, making it the perfect way to express heartfelt emotions to your special someone.

💖 PACKAGE INCLUDED: The Giftinghouse Valentines Day card comes with a matching red envelope and a embossed heart sticker to seal the envelope, adding an elegant touch and making it easy to share your love and heartfelt wishes.

💖 IDEAL DIMENSIONS: Measuring 15 x 15 cm, this Valentines card provides ample space for your personal message. The inside features a heartfelt "Happy Valentine’s Day" message, allowing you to add your own touch and make it truly special. Designed with thoughtful attention to your needs.

💖 PERFECT FOR ALL LOVED ONES: Whether it’s a Valentines card for him, a Valentines card for her, Valentines card husband, Valentines card wife, Valentines card fiancée, boyfriend Valentines card or a Valentines card for girlfriend, this card is the perfect way to express your love.

💖 PREMIUM QUALITY: Our Valentine’s Day card is crafted with meticulous attention to detail and printed on premium 350gsm cardstock, offering exceptional durability and a luxurious feel that stands out.

💖 ETHICAL & ECO-FRIENDLY: Join us in our environmental commitment. Giftinghouse is an ethical, eco-conscious small business crafting fully recyclable and plastic-free Valentines cards from high-quality paper.
🇬🇧 MADE IN THE UK: Proudly designed and printed in the UK, ensuring top-notch quality.
description: ❤️ PACKAGE: 👉 1 Valentines card with a red envelope and a gold-embossed sticker. ❤️ IDEAL DIMENSION: 👉 15 x 15 cm – reasonably sized yet compact. ❤️ HIGH-QUALITY: 👉 Fully recyclable, plastic-free, and premium quality feel and look. This card has been proudly designed, printed, and packed in the UK. ❤️ LUXURY ECO-FRIENDLY CARD: 👉 All of our products are ethical and environmentally friendly. This card is printed on high-quality paperboard using vegetable-based inks. 🔹 MADE IN THE UK 🔹
